attribution.text: Books from StoryWeaver, an open library by Pratham Books. Licensed CC BY 4.0.

books.title: Too Big! Too Small!
books.description: Shanu is too big for Ammi to carry. And too small to go to school alone. Are you too small to read this story on your own? Or are you too big to have someone read it aloud with you? Open it and find out!

books.title: Gappu Can't Dance
books.description: Everyone in Class 1A knows Gappu can’t dance. When the students raise their left hand, she raises her right! Can Komal Ma’am get Gappu to dance? A story about the joy of dancing, using the concept of opposites.

books.title: Lost and Found
books.description: A little boy looks for something he has lost and guess what happens when he finds it? Read on to find out for yourself.

books.title: The Mango Tree
books.description: A little girl loves to hide in a big mango tree. Guess who finds her in the end?

books.title: Ammachi's Amazing Machines
books.description: Sooraj and his grandma LOVE inventing! Join them on their latest adventure: using simple machines to make coconut barfi!

books.title: Angry Akku
books.description: Akku is having an awful day and it’s making her very, VERY angry. Read this book to find out how Akku's anger melts away, and get ideas on what to do when YOU are very, VERY angry.

books.title: When Will Amma Be Back?
books.description: Roja’s mother leaves for work early in the day. She promises to be back by bedtime. What will Roja do all day without Amma?

books.title: Get Down, Rocky!
books.description: When Rocky gets stuck on the roof of a church, Rose’s family and neighbours try to bring him down. Will they be able to rescue Rocky?

books.title: Welcome to the Forest
books.description: Tulsa is off to Kanha Tiger Reserve with her school friends. Along with the forest officials, the students experience the jungle in a unique and exciting way.

books.title: The Girl Who Could Not Stop Laughing
books.description: Every day T. Sundari gets into trouble because most things make her laugh. She just cannot keep her mouth sealed. T. Sundari wants to know if something is wrong with her. Because if there isn't, she can laugh all the time!

books.title: A Butterfly Smile
books.description: Kavya’s family has just moved from her village to Bengaluru and she is the newest girl in her class. Go along with Kavya as she visits a butterfly park where she discovers a special connection with butterflies and also makes a new friend.

books.title: Sweet Sunday
books.description: Simran, Jeet and Veer go to Manjit Paaji’s sweet shop to buy their favourite goodies. Watch Manjit Paaji weigh the treats and find out how much each of them buys at the shop.

books.title: The Case of the Missing Water
books.description: When the tank in Ranj’s village dries up, she sets out on a mission to find the missing water. Join Detective Ranj on the case.

books.title: Who Stole Bhaiya's Smile?
books.description: Bhaiya doesn’t feel like playing these days. Could it be because of his new monster friend Dukduk, who is always hanging around him? No one in the family takes Bhaiya seriously. But Chiru knows there’s more than what meets the eye. A story about the lingering effects of depression.

books.title: There's a Hole in my Galaxy
books.description: Three friends blast off from Earth in a rocket to explore the Solar System. Suddenly, they find themselves being pulled by a black hole. Do they manage to escape? Find out what happens on this space odyssey.

books.title: The Mystery of the Cyber Friend
books.description: Shree loves learning new things on the computer. It has games and it has social media sites! She is thrilled to make a new friend on one such site. But is this friend lying to her? Find out for yourself in this cyber thriller.

books.title: ¡Todo revuelto!
books.description: Ammu está lista para salir al escenario pero no puede recordar sus líneas. Mucha diversión a la par que va mezclando sus líneas.

books.title: ¡Hola, Sol!
books.description: Saluda a las maravillas. Dí '¡Hola!' a los milpiés, ranas, barbets y todo lo que bajo el sol llama a la Tierra, su hogar. Y esto te incluye a ti.

books.title: ¡Contigo, Ma!
books.description: Aady se rehúsa a hacer algo sin su 'Ma', ya sea si están haciendo las maletas para su fin de semana en Assam o si juegan en el río. ¿Este viaje hará a Aadya más independiente?

books.title: Tara de aventura en las copas de los árboles
books.description: Un cuento de altura sobre la increíble aventura de una joven con hojas risueñas, ardillas chirriantes y aviones morados.

books.title: Un perro llamado 'Shu'
books.description: '¡Shuu!', dicen todos los que ven a la perrita marrón. Lo oye tan a menudo que empieza a pensar que es su nombre. Hasta que un niño que toma un atajo para volver a casa, decide compartir su almuerzo con ella...

books.title: Maya la guerrera
books.description: Maya siente que no está perteneciendo. Siente que no encaja con las chicas y chicos de su clase. Síguela en su viaje de autoconocimiento. Un libro ilustrado sobre aprender a amarse a uno mismo.

books.title: No me creerás
books.description: Este es un niño al que le encanta el colegio, pero quizás a la inversa no. Sus compañeros le molestan. Sus profesores le gritan. Pero hay un estanque lleno de peces donde descubre que no ha estado solo.

books.title: Un arreglo a tiempo
books.description: Primero, una camisa rasgada y luego, una plancha defectuosa. El día acaba de empezar para Shyam. Como todo va mal, uno tras otro, Shrisha le lleva a Reparación Mela donde se puede arreglar casi todo.

books.title: Lara, la coccinelle jaune
books.description: Un insecte jaune dans un monde rouge, Lara, la coccinelle, veut seulement être en harmonie avec les autres.

books.title: Je veux celui-là!
books.description: 'Pas celui-là,' dit la maman d'Anil lorsque celui-ci réclame quelque chose. 'Pas celui-là', lui répondent également tous les marchands. Tout cela met forcément le petit garçon très en colère!

books.title: C'est de la faute du chat!
books.description: Dans cette histoire, le petit garçon n'a pas pu faire ses devoirs à cause d'un chat espiègle. Cette excuse ne te semble pas très valable? Eh bien, découvre ce qui est arrivé au petit garçon et tu comprendras qu'une chose peut en entraîner une autre, puis une autre, puis encore une autre...

books.title: Le Bébé Éléphant Est Très Curieux
books.description: Did you know that an elephant's trunk was really short? But then how did it become so long?

books.title: C'est lourd comment ?
books.description: Un caillou est plus lourd qu'une plume, mais plus léger qu'une pierre. Du coup, est-il lourd ou léger ? Peut-on savoir précisément à quel point un caillou est lourd ou léger ? Viens découvrir les réponses fascinantes à ces questions dans ce livre amusant sur le poids.

books.title: Anansi, La Fainéante
books.description: The reason why spiders have long thin legs.

books.title: النَّحْلَةُ والفِيلُ
books.description: يُحَاوِلُ الْفِيلُ أَنْ يُسَاعِدَ نَحْلَةً صَغِيرَةً تَائِهَةً لِتَجِدَ بَيْتَهَا. هَلْ هُوَ الْعُشُّ؟ أَمِ الْكَهْفُ؟ أَيْنَ تَعِيشُ النَّحْلَةُ؟

books.title: آلُو-مَالُو-كَالُو
books.description: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ، كَانَ يَجِبُ عَلَى مَالُو أَنْ يَحْصُدَ بَعْضَ الْبَطَاطَا مِنْ حَدِيقَةِ مَطْبَخِ جَدَّتِهِ، لَكِنَّهُ لَمْ يَسْتَطِعِ الْعُثُورَ عَلَى أَيٍّ مِنْهَا. وَعِنْدَهَا سَاعَدَهُ كَالُو فِي كَشْفِ الْبَطَاطَا الْمَخْفِيَّةِ.

books.title: آلَاتُ جَدَّتِي الْمُدْهِشَةُ
books.description: الْفَتَى سُورَاجُ وَجَدَّتُهُ يُحِبَّانِ الِاخْتِرَاعَاتِ! انْضَمُّوا إِلَيْهِمَا فِي أَحْدَثِ مُغَامَرَاتِهِمَا: اسْتِخْدَامُ آلَاتٍ بَسِيطَةٍ لِصُنْعِ بَارْفِيهِ بِجَوْزِ الْهِنْدِ!

books.title: ما هذه الرائحة؟
books.description: هناك أحدٌ ما يأكل كل طعام ماداف وتارا. مخلوقات غريبة، أم وحوش غامضة، أم شيء مخفي؟ من قد يكون؟

books.title: أريد أن أركب دراجة نارية
books.description: ضياء مفتونة بالدراجات النارية، وتنتظر بفارغ الصبر بلوغ السادسة عشرة حتى تتمكن من قيادة واحدة، خاصة بعدما اكتشفت أن خالتها راكبة دراجات نارية! قصة شائقة تتحدث عن الهوية وحرية الاختيار.

books.title: सैर सपाटा
books.description:
पाँच दोस्त जब सैर सपाटा करने जाते हैं तो बड़ा मज़ा आता है।
और नए चटपटे खाने के तो क्या कहने!

books.title: चूहा सिकंदर, घर के अंदर
books.description: एक चूहा घर में दाखिल होता है। फिर वहाँ अफरातफरी मच जाती है। पेश है बच्चों के लिए जोश से भरी यह कहानी।

books.title: टक टक
books.description: सोनापुर के भोजनभट्ट राजा अपने कक्ष में आती रहस्यमयी आवाज़ के कारण सो नहीं पाए। यह रहस्यमयी आवाज़ किस की थी?

books.title: चिपको चिपको वृक्ष बचाओ
books.description: ऊँचे पहाड़ों की यह कहानी बतलाती है कि हौंसला हो तो क्या कुछ नहीं हो सकता। एक भोटिया लड़की दिची, अपने प्यारे पेड़ों को बचाने के लिए चिपको आंदोलन का सहारा लेती है। उनके गाँव में हर कोई जानता है कि जीवन की सब ज़रूरी चीज़ें पेड़ों से आती हैं। अलकनन्दा नदी के हिमालय क्षेत्र में पेड़ों के भारी कटाव से १९७० के दशक में बहुत बा़ढ आई। इसने पेड़ों से लिपट कर उन्हें काटने से बचाने के आंदोलन को जन्म दिया। इस दिल को छू लेने वाली कहानी को पढ़िए और देखिए कि एकता की ताकत क्या होती है।

books.title: Papa
books.description: Mom is away and Dad is making the morning porridge.

books.title: Grande Autocarro Azul
books.description: Ebei and his mother are waiting for the big blue bus. Where is it?

books.title: O Frango E O Gongolo
books.description: An adorable tale on why chicken and millipedes are enemies.

books.title: Anansi Dá As Histórias Às Pessoas
books.description:
Long ago, the sky kept all stories locked up in a wooden box. People asked clever Anansi to ask the sky god for the stories. The sky god agreed, but only if Anansi performed three seemingly impossible tasks.
Read Story

books.title: Tớ đi học
books.description: Tớ đi học, và trong 12 tháng, tớ học được rất nhiều điều.
illustrators: San srei nou ch nou ch

books.title: Xanh thật là xanh
books.description: Cô bé Xanh nghịch ngợm hôm nay biến thành một cái cây để trốn ngủ trưa, mặc cho bố tìm kiếm. Rong chơi mãi dưới ánh nắng chói chang, Xanh thấm mệt và muốn về nhà với bố, nhưng cô bé lạc đường mất rồi! Không biết phải làm thế nào, Xanh khóc mãi làm nước sông dâng cao, ngập lụt cả thành phố. Bất chợt, Xanh nghĩ ra một cách để tìm bố!

books.title: Cái Hạt Đi Lạc
books.description: Trên đường đi học về, bé tìm được một cái hạt gì lạ lắm. Bé tò mò không biết đây là hạt cây gì nhỉ. Cả nhà cũng chẳng ai biết đây là hạt gì. Thế cái hạt này từ đâu đến nhỉ?

books.title: Маленькие маляры
books.description: Красить дом очень весело! Но в какой же цвет покрасить ворота?

books.title: День Ежегодной Стрижки
books.description: У Ивана Ивановича были очень длинные волосы. В День Ежегодной Стрижки он хотел их постричь. Но все были заняты. Вы никогда не угадаете, кто в итоге ему помог!

books.title: Was findest du in meiner Küche?
books.description:
Töpfe, Pfannen, Löffel, Gemüse und Gas helfen uns leckeres Essen in der Küche zu zubereiten. 
Gibt es noch etwas anderes in deiner Küche?

books.title: Unter dem Bett
books.description: Manchmal lauern komische Dinge unter meinem Bett. Willst du wissen, was ich neulich gefunden habe?

books.title: Bheema, tèt la Sleepy
books.description: Bheema gen yon pwoblèm ke anpil nan nou gen chak maten. Li jis pa ka reveye sou tan! Yon zanmi ti ede l. Èske ou ta renmen konnen ki jan?

books.title: Tout Sa Se Fòt Chat la!
books.description: Ti gason nan istwa sa a pa t kapab fin fè devwa l poutèt yon vye chat malfezan. Sa sanble ak yon eskiz raz, pa vre? Ebyen, li pou konnen kisa ki te pase l, epi w ap wè kijan yon sèl bagay ka mennen nan yon lòt, epi nan yon lòt, epi nan yon lòt...

books.title: The Greedy Mouse
books.description: A mouse tries to carry a big bun home. Then he learns that it does not always pay to be greedy.

books.title: The Lion's  Howdah
books.description: What happens when the king of the jungle imitates the king of the city? Many rocking adventures! Read this funny story to find out more.

books.title: Watch Out! The Tiger is Here!
books.description: When a tiger moves through the forest, all the animals and birds know! Listen to the different alarm calls that warn everyone in the forest that the tiger is here.

books.title: The Magic Block
books.description: Bhaiya's special pen rolls under the bed. Rinky tries to get it back but she can’t reach it! Will a little black block be able to help her?

books.title: Goodnight, Tinku!
books.description: Tinku, a little pup at Mangu's farm is not sleepy at all. He decides to step out into the night and meets many interesting animals.

books.title: Tell Me, What is a Drone?
books.description: A drone flies. It takes photographs, saves wildlife and can rescue people during an earthquake. Would you like to meet a drone?

books.title: The Night the Moon Went Missing
books.description: When the moon doesn’t rise from the sea one night, it is up to Maisha and her friend Uchli the flying fish to find her. But how can they look for the moon without any light?

books.title: Ammachi's Incredible Investigation
books.description: Someone's been stealing all the unniappams! Help detectives Ammachi and Sooraj, as they look for clues, set traps, and catch the thief!

books.title: Whoop, Goes the Pufferfish
books.description: A baby Pufferfish is stuck in a shallow pool of seawater. Will it find its way back home to the sea?

books.title: Around the World With a Chilli
books.description: Behind the humble chilli is a fascinating story that takes one around the world. This story is not just about the spicy chilli, but also about the adventures of brave warriors and traders, about stormy seas and new lands. Enjoy this fascinating account written by a renowned expert on globalization.

books.title: Raju's First Flight
books.description: It’s an exciting day for Raju. Join him as he prepares for a very special flight journey.

books.title: A Helping Hand
books.description: There's a new girl in class and our teacher has asked me to be her friend and show her around. But I'm not sure I want to - she's... not like the rest of us! A fascinating tale of friendship and fitting in, which tells its story through letters.

books.title: ¿En qué anda Ameena?
books.description: Una tarde soñolienta el domingo, Ameena está ocupada de algún proyecto secreto. La familia suya también no puede encontrar las cosas como el periódico, la pintura.  ¿Qué está pasando?

books.title: ¿Una calle o un zoo?
books.description: Tres amigos Sonu, Monu y Rina Empezaron a jugar en la calle. Pero no sabían que se encontrarían con tantos animales. ¿Te gustaría conocerlos?

books.title: ¿Qué pasaría si...?
books.description: ¿Qué pasaría si Sunita presiona su ombligo? ¿O si estira sus orejas? Lee este tierno cuento sobre el poder de la imaginación.

books.title: Los fantásticos lentes de Amelia
books.description: Amelia está aburrida en su casa hasta que descubre un secreto muy especial. ¿Quieres saber de qué se trata?

books.title: El pequeño mundo de Piku
books.description: A Piku le encantan las tardes largas de verano, y no le gustan nada las oscuras noches veraniegas. Pero sus tardes se tornaron oscura, cuando, de pronto, no hay nadie para leer a Piku un cuento. ¿Se quedarán los libros de Piku sin leer?

books.title: Nuestra librería
books.description: ¿Te gustan los coches, dinosaurios y leer sobre ellos? ¿Tienes preguntas e ideas? ¿Te gusta que te lean? ¿O te gusta leer solo en un rincón tranquilo? Pasa dentro, ¡bienvenido a nuestra biblioteca!

books.title: Los constructures del cuerpo
books.description: Vava está maravillado de que su pequeña hermana supiese cómo hacer su propio pelo, sus propios pulmones e incluso sus piernas —cada vez más grandes— cuando estaba en el vientre de Amma. Acompáñale mientras explora cómo el millón de células dentro nuestro crecen y construyen nuestro cuerpo.

books.title: ¿Qué edad tiene Muttajji?
books.description: Putta y Putti saben que Muttajji es muy, muy viejo. Pero, ¿qué edad tiene exactamente? Únete a los detectives gemelos en un emocionante viaje matemático a través de los recuerdos de Muttajji y la historia de la India en su búsqueda para romper la gran pregunta.

books.title: Le gros roi et le chien maigre
books.description: Toi aussi, court avec le gros roi pour attraper le chien maigre !

books.title: Bonne nuit, Tinku !
books.description: Tinku, le petit chiot de la ferme de Mangu, n'a pas sommeil du tout. Il décide de sortir dans la nuit et rencontre plein d'animaux intéressants.

books.title: Mais qui a volé les petits gâteaux ?
books.description: Quelqu'un a volé tous les petits gâteaux d'Ammachi ! Viens jouer au détective avec Ammachi et Sooraj, et trouver des indices, installer des pièges et attraper le voleur !

books.title: Des Amis Devenus Ennemis
books.description: Will hardworking Hyena ever learn his lesson when it comes to his friend the lazy Hare ?

books.title: L'oiseau d'or
books.description: Lorsque le roi découvre qu'un oiseau d'or peut faire de lui l'empereur de l'univers, il décide de le capturer. Mais sa fille n'est pas d'accord. Elle rassemble tout son courage pour s'opposer à la décision de son père.

books.title: Qui a volé le beau sourire de Bhaiya?
books.description: Bhaiya n'a pas envie de jouer en ce moment. Est-ce à cause de son ami le monstre, Monstro, qui ne le quitte plus ? Personne ne prend Bhaiya au sérieux dans sa famille. Seule Chiru comprend que quelque chose de grave est en train de se passer. Découvre cette petite histoire sur les conséquences de la dépression.

books.title: بهيما النَّعْسَانُ
books.description: بَهِيمَا لَدَيْهِ مُشْكِلَةٌ الْعَدِيدُ مِنَّا يُعَانِي مِنْهَا فِي كُلِّ صَبَاحٍ، هُوَ فَقَطْ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُ الِاسْتِيقَاظَ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ! سَاعَدَهُ صَدِيقٌ صَغِيرٌ فِي حَلِّ هَذِهِ الْمُشْكِلَةِ. هَلْ تَوَدُّ أَنْ تَعْرِفَ كَيْفَ سَاعَدَهُ؟

books.title: مَتَى سَتَعُودُ أُمِّي؟
books.description: تَذْهَبُ أُمُّ رُوجَا إِلَى الْعَمَلِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ، وَتَعِدُهَا أَنَّهَا سَتَرْجِعُ قَبْلَ مَوْعِدِ نَوْمِهَا. مَاذَا سَتَفْعَلُ رُوجَا طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ بِدُونِ أُمِّهَا؟

books.title: أَصْبَحَتِ الْأَرْنَبَةُ طَاهِيَةً
books.description: جَزَرٌ نِيءٌ عَلَى الْإِفْطَارِ! جَزَرٌ نِيءٌ عَلَى الْغَدَاءِ! جَزَرٌ نِيءٌ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى عَلَى الْعَشَاءِ! تُحَاوِلُ الْأَرْنَبَةُ الَّتِي سَئِمَتْ جِدًّا مِنْ تَنَاوُلِ الْجَزَرِ النِّيءِ أَنْ تَتَعَلَّمَ كَيْفِيَّةَ طَهْيِ الْجَزَرِ النِّيءِ لِجَعْلِهِ أَكْثَرَ لَذَّةً.

books.title: الكلب الذي عرف الحزن
books.description: يلاحق الحزن فيروز كظله، ولكن نوح صديقه المفضل معه دائمًا ليطارد حزنه ويبعده.

books.title: خلاي تتحدث إلى النباتات
books.description: Khalai is a little girl who talks to different plants.

books.title: स्कूल का पहला दिन
books.description: आज रानी का स्कूल में पहला दिन है। उसने क्या-क्या देखा? उसे कैसा लगा?

books.title: अम्मा जब  स्कूल गयीं
books.description: मीरा की अम्मा एक दिन उसके स्कूल गयीं पर वहाँ कोई नहीं था, मीरा, उसके मित्र, शिक्षक और यहाँ तक कि बड़ी दीदी भी। वे सब कहाँ गायब हो गए थे?

books.title: दम-दमा-दम बिरयानी!
books.description: बाशा और साईनबी परेशान हैं। अम्मी बीमार है, और सायरा चाची ने अभी अभी बताया है कि वो २३ लोगों के साथ खाने पर आ रही हैं! भावी रसोइये बाशा का मानना है कि अम्मी की दम बिरयानी वो भी बना सकता है। लेकिन समस्या यह है कि उसे बिरयानी के मसालों का अंदाज सिर्फ ४ लोगों के हिसाब से ही पता है। इस समस्या के समाधान के लिए महान गणितज्ञ साईनबी आगे आती है और बताती है कि कैसे ४ लोगों की विधि को २४ लोगों के लिए बदला जा सकता है। क्या यह जोड़ी वाकई मजेदार दम-दमा-दम बिरयानी बनाने में सफल होती है? जानने के लिए पढ़िए इस कहानी को!

books.title: ये मुहँ और मसूर की दाल
books.description: नए बावर्ची ने नवाब साहब को मसूर की दाल क्या खिलाई कि...

books.title: Feliz E Triste
books.description: Often, an inquisitive child asks his parents an endless set of questions. The 'Tell me ... now!' Series describes how interesting the questions and answers turn out. This one is about feelings and emotions.

books.title: A Deficiência Não É Uma Incapacidade
books.description: We all have different abilities, but find out what we have in common.

books.title: Bode,O Rei Falso
books.description: Ever wondered why a goat refuses to move when pulled? Read the story of the Goat King to find out.

books.title: Anansi Preguiçoso
books.description: The reason why spiders have long thin legs.

books.title: Ngủ gà ngủ gật
books.description: Suỵtttt, cả thế giới đã ngủ rồi. Hãy đọc một câu chuyện trước giờ đi ngủ nhé.

books.title: Lỗi tại con mèo!
books.description: Bạn nhỏ nọ không làm bài tập về nhà, nhưng bạn có lí do rất thú vị: tất cả là tại con mèo nhà bạn ấy. Vậy con mèo có lỗi gì nhỉ? Hãy đọc câu chuyện này để cùng biết nhé!

books.title: Biển Ở Đâu?
books.description: Một ngày, khi mùa đông đến, bé Mây thấy bản làng của mình thật xấu, xấu như con mèo màu tro. Mây hỏi thầy giáo bản của thầy ở đâu. Thầy giáo trả lời rằng thầy từ miền biển đến. Đấy là một nơi rất nhiều nắng ấm và nhiều cá tôm. Bé Mây nhất định muốn nhìn thấy biển, bé chạy lên cao, đứng trên một hòn đá lớn, trèo lên cái cây to nhất. Ấy thế mà bé chẳng nhìn thấy biển, chỉ thấy bản làng hiện ra, lấp la lấp lánh…

books.title: Считаем животных
books.description: Все животные в джунглях очень хотят пить! Присоединитесь к ним на их пути к водоему.

books.title: Король птиц
books.description: Птицы хотят, чтобы у них был король, но не могут решить, кто должен им быть. Они решают, что королем должен стать тот, кто выше всех взлетит. Стервятник думает, что победил, но крошечная птичка обманывает его. Будет ли у птиц король?

books.title: Die 7 Farben des Regenbogens
books.description: Guck dich um! Siehst du irgendwo die sieben Farben des Regenbogens?

books.title: Didi und der bunte Schatz
books.description: Die Kinder lebten in der Nähe von einer Müllhalde und rannten dort den ganzen Tag herum. Sie gingen nicht in die Schule. Eines Tages kam Didi in die Halde und änderte ihr Leben für immer. Lerne Didi und ihre jungen Freunde in dieser wunderschönen Geschichte über die Freuden des Lesens kennen.

books.title: Gwo wa, chen mens
books.description: Kouri ak wa ki gwo a dèyè chen ki mens lan!
